items.title: Gauff beats Cirstea in Madrid despite stomach virus
items.summary: Coco Gauff battles sickness as she digs deep to come from a set and a break down and beat Sorana Cirstea to reach the last 16 of the Madrid Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
